subject: rpmsg: qcom_glink_native: fix error return code of qcom_glink_rx_data()
notes: Second retry after Anthropic weekly-limit reset confirmed via probe (rep1, rep2 aborted before completing).
fits_pattern=true; bug = qcom_glink_rx_data() returns ret=0 on the !intent failure branch without assigning -ENOENT first.
POC mirrors seed slice (qcom_glink_rx_data pre-fix + sibling) with matching F1/F2/F3/F5 counts (acq=2 rel=0 goto=6 ret=5 if=8); verifier-v1 OK on first pass (poc_regens=0).

Pattern matches err-1 family closely (int ret/err = 0 init → failure-branch goto without err assignment). Predicate set adapted from validated err-1-rep1 with variable name extended to {ret,err,rc}; all three predicates VALIDATED on first iteration.

Stage-5 oracle: final.ql fires 3 times on qcom_glink_rx_data_buggy (lines 52,59,64 — the !channel, !intent, insufficient gotos that all lack ret assignment) and is silent on qcom_glink_rx_data_fixed (where ret = -ENOENT / -ENOMEM is assigned before each goto).
